rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.255, which governs agency use of a statewide student mental health plan. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.255. AGENCY USE OF STATEWIDE PLAN.
_note: Rule text concerns student mental health planning; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No conflict.
